title: fix: add missing secrets for nova and qwen models
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Unlocking Nova and Qwen
gist.blurb: We've securely tucked the right API keys into our infrastructure so the Nova and Qwen models are back to buzzing smoothly. Time to get generating!
gist.summary: Added missing API keys to the text and image services to restore functionality for Qwen and Nova models.
gist.impact: Users can once again generate content using Qwen text models and Nova image/video models without encountering authorization errors.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee unlocking a secure server or vault with a glowing key, representing the addition of missing API secrets for the models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security badge, inserting a glowing lime green (#ecf874) pixelated key into a retro server rack. A chunky monitor robot stands nearby, its screen showing a happy unlocked padlock icon. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security badge, inserting a glowing lime green (#ecf874) pixelated key into a retro server rack.
